title: ACDP Registry State (v0.1.0)
description: The registry-maintained portion of a context, returned alongside the body on retrieval. In v0.1.0 this contains only the derived 'status' field. Future versions will add lifecycle_events, relationships, and attestations. Consumers MUST tolerate unknown fields for forward compatibility.

status.description: Derived from supersession queries and the clock. The registry computes and serves this; consumers can verify independently.
